scripts.test: node tests/classifyDocument.test.js && node tests/scanFolder.test.js && node tests/createCleanFileName.test.js && node tests/createSafeClientName.test.js && node tests/createOrganizationPlan.test.js && node tests/createPreviewPack.test.js && node tests/inspectFolder.test.js && node tests/commandRouter.test.js && node tests/createClientPack.test.js && node tests/createClientPackReadme.test.js && node tests/createZipFromFolder.test.js && node tests/nestedClientPack.test.js && node tests/detectDuplicateFiles.test.js
scripts.zip:latest: LATEST_PACK=$(find outputs/client-packs -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'client-pack-*' | sort | tail -1) && test -n "$LATEST_PACK" && node src/index.js zip-client-pack "$LATEST_PACK"
